description: Routing-resolution fixtures for the /wf skill (20-key surface after the wf-meta+wf-docs dissolve). The first positional token selects skills/wf/reference/<key>.md. intake is a mode dispatcher: a mode keyword resolves to intake/<mode>.md, an existing slug + free scope auto-routes to intake/extend.md (extension), an existing slug + mode attaches a compressed slice. status/recap/close are navigation/lifecycle keys; ship-plan and docs are routers. review owns its own slug-vs-dimension resolution. The former wf-meta and wf-docs skills are dissolved into /wf; the augmentation keys (instrument/experiment/benchmark/profile) are gone — they are now a shape decision applied by plan/implement/verify.

fixtures.purpose: Plain intake, no mode keyword â€” the default product-owner intake (stage 1). intake.md dispatches to the default mode reference.
intake 'fix' mode â€” compressed planning entry. intake.md resolves the mode keyword to intake/fix.md.
intake 'rca' mode â€” root-cause-first entry (two positional args: incident + date).
intake 'update-deps' mode â€” hyphenated keyword parses correctly.
intake 'ideate' mode â€” pre-pipeline ideation; the mode reference creates no workflow.
intake 'investigate' mode â€” solution-options sketch.
intake 'discover' mode â€” hypothesis test; everything after the keyword is the statement.
fixtures.invocation: /wf intake discover users abandon checkout flow

fixtures.purpose: intake 'hotfix' mode â€” emergency entry.
intake 'refactor' mode â€” behavior-preserving entry.
Slug-mode: an existing slug BEFORE a mode keyword attaches a compressed slice. intake.md checks slug existence first, then loads the mode reference, which writes via _compressed-slice.md.
probe is its own /wf key (runtime-truth verification, slug-only).
simplify is its own /wf key (review-and-route triage); first positional is a scope keyword, not a slug.
shape with explicit slug.
slice with explicit slug.
plan with slug + slice.
implement with slug + slice.
implement with literal `reviews` second arg (fix-blockers mode). The second token is the reference's own argument, not a sub-key â€” the router must not treat `reviews` as ambiguous.
verify with slug.
review with slug + slice.
review with triage as second arg (re-visit deferred findings).
handoff with slug.
ship with slug.
retro with slug.
Unknown first token must NOT be silently treated as a slug. Router prints an error listing valid keys.
Bare /wf should render the menu, not pick a default sub-command.
status navigation key (absorbs next+sync). Dashboard/detail/registry-reconcile.
recap navigation key (renamed from resume, absorbs how explain modes).
close lifecycle key (absorbs skip, slice-scoped). Workflow close with a reason.
ship-plan router key (init/build/edit/audit). Resolves the sub-key inside the router.
docs router key (former /wf-docs). Orchestrator or a Diataxis primitive, resolved inside the router.
intake extension auto-route: an existing on-disk slug followed by free scope (no mode keyword) routes to intake/extend.md (replaces the former wf-meta extend).
review as the single review surface: a known dimension (no slug) runs ad-hoc, resolved inside review.md Step 00.
